name: taugo
description: TauGo is an executable Go kernel for the τ operator (chap. III.8 of the InteroperabiliteAgentique monograph), exposing a single public API, Kernel.Decide(ctx, Exchange) → Decision, that selects a call regime (Deterministe | Probabiliste | Refus) at the agentic frontier. It is a pure-local, standard-library-only project built on strict 4-layer Clean Architecture (CI/CD removed in v0.1.2, ADR-0010). Note: this project has over 100 source files; consider scoping analysis to a subdirectory for faster results.
